Event: Tavern of Fortune - September 2025
Event Date: 25/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI233
Cat's Gaze Ring

Upon attacking, the unit has a 40% chance to set the target on fire. The unit on fire receives 208000 magic damage, and the healing it receives is reduced by 30% for 3 sec.
Every 3 time it is triggered, the ring's owner also sets 2 enemy units closest to the primary target on fire. Units on fire receive 208000 magic damage, and the healing they receive is reduced by 30% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
